hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push.*(-f|--force)"; then echo "BLOCKED: force push 금지. main 보호 룰 위반." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git reset --hard"; then echo "BLOCKED: reset --hard 금지. 작업 손실 위험." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push.*origin.*main"; then echo "BLOCKED: main 직접 push 금지. PR로 머지하세요." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "rm -rf (shared|\.github|docs)/"; then echo "BLOCKED: 보호 폴더 삭제 금지." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
from datetime import date
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' not in cmd: sys.exit(0)
root = subprocess.run(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
if not root: sys.exit(0)
log_dir = os.path.join(root, 'docs/daily-logs/subin')
log_file = os.path.join(log_dir, date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') + '.md')
if not os.path.exists(log_file): sys.exit(0)
result = subprocess.run(['git', '-C', root, 'log', '--oneline', '-1'], capture_output=True, text=True)
line = result.stdout.strip()
if not line: sys.exit(0)
parts = line.split(' ', 1)
hash_ = parts[0]
msg = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else ''
entry = f'{hash_} {msg}'
with open(log_file, 'r') as f: content = f.read()
if hash_ in content: sys.exit(0)
if '## 커밋' in content:
    with open(log_file, 'a') as f: f.write(entry + '\n')
else:
    with open(log_file, 'a') as f: f.write(f'\n## 커밋\n\n{entry}\n')
print('daily log 업데이트:', entry)
" 2>/dev/null || true
